site.headline: See governed AI, agents, and apps come to life on Databricks
site.subhead: A curated set of short demos showing how leading enterprises build trustworthy AI — from production agents and user-facing apps to the governance and lineage that keep it all compliant. Pick a story below and press play.

demos.title: Build & deploy production AI agents
demos.summary: Stand up a tool-using agent on your own governed data and ship it to a secure serving endpoint in minutes.
demos.whatItIs: Mosaic AI Agent Framework lets teams author agents that reason over enterprise data, call tools and functions, and deploy to a managed, scalable endpoint — all from one environment.
demos.whyItMatters: Most AI pilots stall on the gap between a notebook prototype and a production service. This collapses that gap into a guided, repeatable path.
demos.businessProblem: Moving from a promising demo to a governed, monitored, production-grade agent without stitching together five vendors.
demos.audience: Heads of AI, ML platform leads, data science teams

demos.title: Orchestrate multiple agents with a supervisor
demos.summary: Coordinate specialist agents — retrieval, analytics, action — under one supervisor that routes each request to the right expert.
demos.whatItIs: A multi-agent supervisor pattern that decomposes a complex business question and delegates to purpose-built agents, then synthesizes a single trustworthy answer.
demos.whyItMatters: Real enterprise questions span systems. A single monolithic prompt can't reliably handle them; coordinated specialists can.
demos.businessProblem: Answering complex, cross-domain questions reliably instead of with brittle one-shot prompts.
demos.audience: AI architects, innovation leaders, line-of-business owners

demos.title: Evaluate agent quality before you ship
demos.summary: Score agents on correctness, safety, and groundedness with automated judges and human-aligned evaluation — turning 'it seems to work' into evidence.
demos.whatItIs: MLflow agent evaluation runs your agent against curated datasets and LLM judges aligned to your domain experts, producing measurable quality scores.
demos.whyItMatters: You can't put AI in front of customers on vibes. Leaders need defensible, repeatable quality metrics before launch and after every change.
demos.businessProblem: Proving an AI system is accurate and safe enough to release — and catching regressions when prompts or models change.
demos.audience: Risk & compliance, AI quality leads, engineering managers

demos.title: Monitor agents in production
demos.summary: Trace every request, watch quality and cost in real time, and get alerted when behavior drifts — full observability for live AI.
demos.whatItIs: MLflow Tracing and Lakehouse Monitoring capture each agent interaction, surface latency, cost, and quality trends, and flag anomalies automatically.
demos.whyItMatters: AI behavior changes as data and usage shift. Continuous monitoring is the difference between a controlled service and an unmanaged liability.
demos.businessProblem: Knowing — not guessing — how a deployed AI system is performing, what it costs, and when it starts to drift.
demos.audience: Platform & SRE teams, FinOps, AI governance

demos.title: Ship user-facing AI applications
demos.summary: Turn models and data into a polished internal app — secured, governed, and hosted on the platform, with no separate infrastructure to manage.
demos.whatItIs: Databricks Apps lets teams build and host interactive applications next to their data and models, inheriting platform security and identity.
demos.whyItMatters: Insights only create value when people use them. Apps put governed AI directly into the hands of business users.
demos.businessProblem: Delivering AI to non-technical users without standing up and securing a separate web stack.
demos.audience: Business unit leaders, product teams, internal tools owners

demos.title: Ask your data questions in plain language
demos.summary: Let business teams ask questions in natural language and get governed, accurate answers backed by trusted data — no SQL required.
demos.whatItIs: AI/BI Genie turns natural-language questions into governed analytics over your curated tables, with the answer always grounded in permissioned data.
demos.whyItMatters: Self-service analytics has been promised for a decade. Natural language over governed data finally makes it real and safe.
demos.businessProblem: Giving every team trusted answers fast, without a backlog of analyst requests or ungoverned spreadsheets.

demos.title: Govern access to every data & AI asset
demos.summary: One permission model for tables, files, models, and agents — set policy once and enforce it everywhere, for every user and tool.
demos.whatItIs: Unity Catalog provides a single governance layer across data and AI, with fine-grained, attribute-based access control that follows the asset wherever it's used.
demos.whyItMatters: Fragmented, tool-by-tool permissions are how breaches and audit failures happen. Unified governance is the foundation of trustworthy AI.
demos.businessProblem: Enforcing consistent, auditable access control across a sprawling data and AI estate.

demos.title: Trace lineage and prove auditability
demos.summary: See exactly where data came from and where it flows — column-level lineage and a full audit trail across data, models, and dashboards.
demos.whatItIs: Automatic, end-to-end lineage and system audit logs capture how every asset is produced and consumed, down to the column.
demos.whyItMatters: Regulators and risk teams increasingly ask 'show me the trail.' Automated lineage answers in seconds instead of weeks of manual mapping.
demos.businessProblem: Demonstrating provenance, impact, and accountability for audits and regulatory reviews.

demos.title: Classify and protect sensitive data
demos.summary: Tag, classify, and mask sensitive fields with policies that apply automatically — so PII stays protected without slowing teams down.
demos.whatItIs: Tag-based classification with attribute-based access control and masking lets you define a policy once and have it enforced across every query and tool.
demos.whyItMatters: Privacy regulations (DPDP, GDPR, and peers) demand demonstrable control over sensitive data; manual approaches don't scale.
demos.businessProblem: Keeping regulated and personal data protected and compliant while still enabling analytics and AI.

demos.title: Unite data, analytics & AI teams
demos.summary: Engineers, analysts, and data scientists work on one shared, governed platform — fewer copies, fewer handoffs, faster outcomes.
demos.whatItIs: A unified workspace where every role collaborates on the same governed data with shared compute, version control, and deployment workflows.
demos.whyItMatters: Siloed tools create duplicated data, conflicting numbers, and slow delivery. One platform removes the friction.
demos.businessProblem: Eliminating costly tool sprawl and handoff delays between data, analytics, and AI teams.
demos.audience: CDO, data platform leaders, heads of engineering

demos.title: Build reliable data + AI pipelines
demos.summary: Ingest, transform, and serve fresh data to your models and apps with declarative pipelines that handle quality and scale for you.
demos.whatItIs: Lakeflow declarative pipelines move data from source to AI-ready, with built-in data quality, incremental processing, and orchestration.
demos.whyItMatters: AI is only as good as the data feeding it. Reliable, fresh pipelines are the unglamorous foundation of every successful AI program.
demos.businessProblem: Delivering trustworthy, timely data to AI systems without hand-built, fragile ETL.

demos.title: The Data Intelligence Platform in 3 minutes
demos.summary: A guided tour connecting the dots — governed data, analytics, ML, agents, and apps — on one open, unified platform.
demos.whatItIs: A high-level walkthrough of how the platform brings data and AI together under unified governance, from raw data to deployed intelligence.
demos.whyItMatters: Executives need the big picture: how the pieces fit and why one platform beats a patchwork of point tools.
demos.businessProblem: Understanding the end-to-end vision before committing to an AI and data strategy.
demos.audience: Executive sponsors, strategy leaders, buying committees
